headline: US Bank takes a swing at automating healthcare payments
summary: The bank is part of a trend of financial institutions trying to streamline a complicated industry that paper has dominated for years.

headline: PNC Financial to Lift Dividend by 18% After 2026 Fed Stress Test
summary: PNC plans an 18% dividend hike after passing the Fed's 2026 stress test, backed by strong capital buffers.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on U.S. Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $66
summary: Truist Securities  analyst John McDonald   maintains U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $62 to $66.

headline: What to Expect From U.S. Bancorp's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: U.S. Bancorp is set to announce its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to grow by double digits.
